title: pavonia schwackei
intro: Pavonia schwackei is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae, commonly known as the "Red Mallow" or "Wild Hibiscus". The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and anthraquinones, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pavonia schwackei include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and internally to promote digestive health.
